identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Technical Precision + Cinematic Emotion
Content is King: The Product (MAGNA) is the Hero
Contrast: Light on Dark, Rough vs Smooth

theme.strategy: Dark Mode Luxury (No toggle, enforced dark theme for brand consistency)

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Product names (MAGNA 1200)

body.usage: Technical specs, Form labels, Footer, Descriptions

rules: Backgrounds must be SOLID or subtle noise texture.
Accents should be metallic (Silver/Steel) or pure white.
Text should never be pure white (#FFFFFF), use #F5F5F5 or #E5E5E5 for eye comfort.

layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid for specs, Asymmetric Grid for Gallery

modes.hero: Full viewport height (100dvh), centered content, video background
modes.manifesto: Single column, large text, scroll-triggered opacity
modes.specs: Dense technical grid, 1px borders, visible structure

visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) to the entire background to prevent color banding and add film grain texture.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Hard shadows or 'Glow' effects for active states. No soft blurry drop-shadows.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders with 10% opacity for sections. 'Technical' look.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Slow, smooth transitions (0.5s ease-out). Text reveal on scroll.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold transition-all
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs transition-all

cards.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-none p-8 hover:border-white/30 transition-colors

forms.input: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 rounded-none px-0 py-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-white focus:ring-0 transition-all
forms.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white/50 mb-2

navigation.style: Fixed top, glassmorphism (blur-md bg-black/50), minimal height

sections_structure.name: Hero
sections_structure.content: MAGNA logo, 'Silenciosamente Imponente' tagline, Scroll indicator

sections_structure.name: Manifesto
sections_structure.content: Emotional copy about luxury, silence, and power. Large serif font.

sections_structure.name: Product Showcase
sections_structure.content: MAGNA 1200 vs MAGNA 900. High-res images, key features highlight.

sections_structure.name: Tech Specs
sections_structure.content: Burner types, Oven capacity, Dimensions, Materials (Acero 304).

sections_structure.name: Contact
sections_structure.content: Name, Email, Phone, Message. CTA: 'Solicitar Asesoramiento'.

content_copy.manifesto: El verdadero lujo no grita. Se siente. MAGNA es la máxima expresión de Morelli. Donde la ingeniería profesional se encuentra con la sofisticación extrema. Diseñada para quienes entienden que la cocina no es solo un lugar, es un escenario.

scroll.description: Smooth scrolling is MANDATORY. Use 'lenis' for that premium 'heavy' scroll feel.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use default shadcn card styles. Remove shadows, use borders.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA compliant).
No gradients. Flat colors or textures only.
